name: database-handler
summary: Database-backed implementation of a datastore handler, bridging a datastore to a SQL table.
description: Creates a database datastore handler that implements a datastore handler interface
problem: You have a datastore interface defined and you need to wire it up to an actual database table — translating model objects to rows on write, and rows back to models on read.
appliesWhen: You already have a datastore (phpnomad/datastore) needing a backing implementation
You have a database table (phpnomad/table) and a model (phpnomad/model) to bridge
The data lives in a relational database accessed via PHPNomad's DatabaseStrategy
You want CRUD operations bridged through a model adapter for type safety
avoidWhen: The datastore handler should hit a non-database backend (write a custom handler)
You don't have a model adapter or table yet (use phpnomad/database-datastore for the full bundle)
The data lives in an external API (write a service, not a database handler)
examples: Wire the OrderDatastore to the orders table
Add database persistence for the existing PayoutDatastore
Implement the storage layer for SubscriptionDatastoreHandler
tradeoffs: Requires the datastore, model, model-adapter, and table to all exist already. Typically used through phpnomad/database-datastore which scaffolds them together. Stand-alone use is fine when the others already exist.
outputs: A {name}DatabaseDatastoreHandler class implementing the datastore handler interface
A DI binding mapping the handler implementation to the handler interface
postApply: Smoke test reads and writes against the database
Add domain query methods to the handler if needed beyond CRUD

name.aiHint: Singular PascalCase entity name. Match the name used by the related datastore, model, and table.

handlerInterface.description: FQCN of the datastore handler interface
handlerInterface.aiHint: Use the handler interface created by phpnomad/datastore. The convention is {namespace}\Datastores\{name}\Interfaces\{name}DatastoreHandler.

model.aiHint: Use the model class created by phpnomad/model. Convention is {namespace}\Models\{name}.

modelAdapter.description: FQCN of the model adapter class
modelAdapter.aiHint: Use the adapter class created by phpnomad/model-adapter. Convention is {namespace}\Models\Adapters\{name}Adapter.

table.aiHint: Use the table class created by phpnomad/table. Convention is {namespace}\Tables\{name}sTable (plural).

initializer.description: FQCN of the initializer to register DI binding in
initializer.aiHint: Pick the initializer that owns the related datastore. Same one you used for phpnomad/datastore.
